overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's urban downtown. The player character moves from an industrial underpass beneath an elevated highway, past a prominent Medical Center building with large digital billboards, and along a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by teal and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with radiation warning signage

events.description: turning left to follow the sidewalk away from the crosswalk
exiting the industrial underpass area onto the main commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass and turning left onto the street, passing industrial buildings marked with yellow radiation warning symbols

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating a canopy overhead
industrial facility with prominent yellow radiation warning triangles on the facade
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in an industrial district. The player walks past a building marked with radiation warning symbols and turns left onto a street, transitioning from the sheltered underpass toward a more commercial area with distant neon lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with medical center and digital advertising towers

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the Medical Center building
passing under the illuminated Medical Center sign with increased ambient neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the Medical Center building, observing the large digital billboards across the street while following the pedestrian flow

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with bright headlights

entered.detail: large multi-story building with illuminated windows and red Medical Center signage
tall building facade covered with bright vertical digital advertisements
small manicured trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street beneath the Medical Center building, the scene features prominent digital billboards and moderate pedestrian traffic. The player moves from open street level into a covered walkway area, with futuristic vehicles passing on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade under elevated highway with corporate branding

events.description: entering the green-lit covered walkway beneath the elevated highway structure
approaching intersection with vehicles crossing the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered green walkway beneath the elevated highway, navigating through denser pedestrian traffic and approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and red pants walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: underside of the highway structure with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
large illuminated red X symbol painted on the concrete wall
large concrete planter with mature palm trees and people sitting on benches
street sign indicating speed limit of 40
commercial shops with illuminated signs beneath the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a distinctive covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, characterized by teal-green flooring and walls, a prominent red corporate X logo, and linear overhead lighting. The player walks past palm tree planters and storefronts while approaching an intersection with active vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bleak industrial underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit commercial heart of the city. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, passing a building marked with radiation warnings before turning left toward the glow of a distant commercial district. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from the sheltered industrial zone to an open street dominated by the Medical Center building and its towering digital billboards. The scene then transitions from the open road into a covered pedestrian walkway, where the lighting shifts to a striking palette of teal-green and red. Finally, the camera glides past corporate logos and palm tree planters toward a busy intersection filled with futuristic vehicle traffic.
